documents.text: review review enantioselective synthesis of indol through catalytic indolization enantioselective synthesis of indol through catalytic indolization bin- miao yang, 1, xiao qian ng, 2, 3 and yu zhao 1, 2, SUMMARY SUMMARY a variety of chiral indole- contain functional molecul are of great importance in chemistry and medicine. these compound have traditionally been prepar by enantioselective functionalization of simple indole substrat. although diverse indolization method are establish for the construction of indol, achiev enantioselectivity directly in these transformation remain elusive until the past decade or so. in this review, we summarize various catalytic indolization strategy for the enantioselective construction of chiral substitut indol or novel indole- bas backbon bear an axial or helical chirality. the cyclization of 2- alkynylanilin either in a direct atroposelective fashion or in cascade with another enantiodetermin transformation will be describ. subsequently, the development of enantioselective fischer indolization, doyle indolization, and chiral indole synthesis via a formal cycloaddition will also be review. INTRODUCTION INTRODUCTION indole is one of the most widely present heteroaren in chemistry and medicine. a variety of chiral indole- contain functional molecul are of great importance(figure 1). for the case of natural product, indole- bas exampl include proteinogenic amino acid l- tryptophan(1), the aspidosperma alkaloid goniomitine(2) isolat from the root bark of gonioma malagasy 1 and the pentacyclic monoterpenoid alkaloid andranginine(3) 2 isolat from craspidospermum verticillatum. numerous indole- bas pharmaceutical are also of great importance, which include the powerful antimigraine medicine frovatriptan(4), 3 statin- bas blood cholesterol drug fluvastatin(5) 4 and the receptor antagonist pharmaceutical tropisetron(6). 5 last but not least, indole- bas backbon also find application as chiral ligand in asymmetric catalysis, as exemplifi by axially chiral indole- fus phosphine ligand BISCAP(7), 6 n- me- 2- BINPO(8), 7 and INDOLPhos(9). 8 due to the importance of chiral indole- contain compound, development of efficient strategy for the construction of enantioenrich indol remain an important research topic in chemical synthesis. toward this goal, the majority of establish method have focus on asymmetric functionalization of simple indol, us strategy such as friedel- craft reaction and nucleophilic addition. 9- 12 although extensive development of indolization method have been document in the literature, 13, 14 realization of stereocontrol in indolization reaction wa not practic for decad due to the absence of intrinsic chirality in the indole moiety. only in the past decade or so, catalytic asymmetric indolization ha caught much interest, by the design and development of novel indole- contain backbon as well as new cascade transformation. in this review, we summarize various catalytic indolization strategy for the enantioselective construction of chiral substitut indol THE BIGGER PICTURE THE BIGGER PICTURE indolization, the process of indole construction from acyclic precursor, ha been extensively explor in synthetic chemistry for the delivery of diversely substitut indol. the introduction of chirality into indole- contain compound, however, ha traditionally been limit to functionalization of indole substrat. this review summariz the new trend and strategy in the enantioselective construction of indole- bas compound, includ(1) catalytic indolization/ functionalization cascad for facile access to diverse enantioenrich indolebas compound and(2) the delivery of novel indole- bas backbon bear an axial or helical chirality. review review figure 1. representative natural product, pharmaceutical, and chiral ligand contain indole skeleton or novel indole- bas backbon bear an axial or helical chirality. these exampl are categoriz into the follow section bas on the type of transformation and operat mechanism: 1. atroposelective indolization of 2- alkynylanilin(schem 1- 6) 2. cascade indolization of 2- alkynylanilin with another enantioselective bond formation 3. 2. 1. indolization of 2- alkynylanilin follow by asymmetric nucleophilic addition(schem 7- 12) 4. 2. 2. indolization of 2- alkynylanilin/ ATROPOSELECTIVE INDOLIZATION OF 2- ALKYNYLANILINES 1. ATROPOSELECTIVE INDOLIZATION OF 2- ALKYNYLANILINES 2- alkynylanilin, which are easily accessible from simple start material, can serve as a valuable precursor for the construction of indol through cyclization. 15- 21 in 1985, taylor, mckillop and co- worker report the first example of pd- catalyz cyclization of 2- alkynylanilin to afford indol. 22 subsequently, a sery of methodology have been report to access indol us 2- alkynylanilin as the substrate. despite these significant achievement, achiev enantio- control in indolization of 2- alkynylanilin remain elusive due to the absence of intrinsic chirality of the indole unit. in 2010, kitagawa and co- worker report a catalytic atroposelective indolization of 2- alkynylanilin for the construction of axially chiral indol bear a carbonnitrogen chiral axis(scheme 1). 23 under condition utiliz PdCl2/(r)- segpho as the catalyst, indolization of a sery of n- aryl- 2- alkynylanilin 10 yield axially chiral indol 11 in good yield with moderate to good enantioselectivity. the result demonstrat that the enantioselectivity of this transformation wa influenc by the substituent r on the alkyne moiety. while the presence of aromatic substituent gave better enantioselectivity than aliphatic on(11a vs. 11b), the presence of ortho- substituent in the aryl unit on the alkyne<!-- image--><!-- image--> scheme 4. pd- catalyz enantioselective cacchi reaction for the synthesis of indol bear a chiral C3- aryl axis<!-- image--> led to further improv enantioselectivity(11c and 11d vs. 11a). the author propos that the enhanc enantioselectivity with ortho- substitut product is likely due to chiral relay through the dynamic axial chirality of the calkynyl- caryl scheme 5. rh(III)- catalyz oxidative coupl of indol and 2- alkynylanilin<!-- image--> review review scheme 6. organocatalytic asymmetric formal iodoaminocyclization of alkyn via vinylidene ortho- quinone methide intermediate<!-- image--> bond. 24 as shown in scheme 1, indolization in transition station 12 is more favor than that in 12 0 that involv more steric repulsion in the two substituent(t bu and r 0). it is worth not that this elegant work represent the first example of catalytic enantioselective indolization. follow this work, 2- alkynylaniline ha become a versatile substrate for the preparation of enantioenrich indol through either enantiodetermin indolization or indolization- contain enantioselective cascade transformation. very recently, ye and co- worker report a chiral phosphoric acid- catalyz direct indolization of 2- ynamide- substitut anilin 13, form axially chiral 2- amino- indol 14 with a c- n linkage in excellent yield and enantioselectivity(scheme 2). 25 substituent r 1 can tolerate both electron- donat and electronwithdraw group, while only benzyl- type substituent are suitable as the r 3 group. bas on the mechanistic study, the author propos the mechanism with chiral phosphoric acid addition to the ynamide unit, form the key intermediate 15 that undergo an intramolecular nucleophilic substitution via the amino unit to afford axially chiral indole product 14.<!-- image--> scheme 7. au- catalyz indolization follow by CPA- catalyz asymmetric michael addition<!-- image--><!-- image--> in 1992, cacchi and co- worker report a palladium- catalyz cascade indolization/ cross- coupl of 2- alkynylanilin with aryl halid or vinyl triflat for the preparation of functionaliz indol. this strategy enabl a highly efficient access to diverse 2, 3- disubstitit indol and is later refer to as the cacchi reaction. 26, 27 although this reaction ha been widely us in the synthesis of indole derivativ, an enantioselective variant remain elusive until the recent report on an asymmetric oxidative cacchi reaction by zhu and co- worker in 2020(scheme 3). 28 this work introduc a highly efficient and versatile construction of axially chiral 2, 3diarylindoles bear a chiral axis at the C2 position, by the reaction of n- sulfonyl- 2alkynylanilines 16 with aryl boronic acid under oxidative palladium catalysis. mechanistic study indicat that the reaction is initiat by transmetallation of palladium(II) with the borate specy deriv from the aryl boronic acid substrate. the resultant pd specy then coordinat with the triple bond in 16 as a p- acid to form the key intermediate 18(favor over the diastereomeric 18 0 due to steric interaction between substituent on the aryl group at the alkyne moiety with the catalyst). subsequent indolization produc 19 in an atroposelective manner, which is follow by reductive elimination to afford the desir 2, 3- diaryl indole 17. oxidation of pd(0) back to pd(II) then complet the catalytic cycle. follow the previous work on the preparation of indol bear a chiral axis at the C2 position, the li group 29 and the wang group 30 report, independently in 2021, the pd- catalyz enantioselective cacchi reaction between 2- alkynylailin 20/ 20 0 and aryl biphenyl or indole- arene compound. as a result, it is more challeng to construct these bisindol in an atroposelective manner. the mechanism of this rh- catalyz system involv c- h activation of indole step, afford the 2, 3′- bisindole product 25. reoxidation of rh(i) to rh(III) is affect by run the reaction in air. in addition to the above exampl of metal- catalyz atroposelective indolization, organocatalytic method have also been document. in 2021, yan and co- worker report an organocatalytic formal iodoaminocyclization of 2- alkynylanilin 28 bear a 2- naphthol unit for the construction of axially chiral 3- iodo- 2- aryl indol 29 with excellent yield and stereoselectivity(scheme 6). 32 this reaction is propos to proce via atroposelective formation of the key iodo- substitut vinylidene- quinone methide(VQM) intermediate 30 by organocatalytic electrophilic substitution of 28 with NIS(n- iodosuccinimide). subsequent trap of the vinylidene unit in 30 with the aniline motif afford the enantioenrich 3- iodo- 2- aryl indol 29 with transfer of the axially chirality of allene to the biaryl unit. high diastereoselectivity is also obtain for the c- n axis bear the ortho- tBu- substitut arene. notably VQM ha been appli as a powerful and versatile electrophilic intermediate in many asymmetric catalytic system in recent year. 33, 34 2. CASCADE INDOLIZATION OF 2- ALKYNYLANILINES WITH ANOTHER ENANTIOSELECTIVE BOND FORMATION 2. CASCADE INDOLIZATION OF 2- ALKYNYLANILINES WITH ANOTHER ENANTIOSELECTIVE BOND FORMATION the strategy of enantioselective tandem or cascade reaction ha shown significant utility in chemical synthesis over the past few decad. higher efficiency and economy in stereoselective synthesis can be achiev by facile construction of molecular complexity in a one- pot fashion. novel transformation that are not possible us stepwise approach can also be realiz, where unstable, active intermediat can be adopt to achieve multiple bond formation without the ne for difficult isolation. 35- 42 us this strategy, indolization of 2- alkynylanilin ha been combin with various enantioselective transformation to achieve an overall efficient and enantioselective construction of indol. different approach along these lin are discus in the follow section. 2. 1. indolization of 2- alkynylanilin follow by asymmetric nucleophilic addition 2. 1. indolization of 2- alkynylanilin follow by asymmetric nucleophilic addition in 2016, han and co- worker report an intramolecular indolization/ michael addition cascade reaction under relay catalysis of au(i) complex and chiral phosphoric acid. start from cyclohexadienone- fus 2- alkynylainlin(31), tetrahydrocarbazol(32) bear two stereogenic center were afford in excellent yield with good enantioselectivity(scheme 7). 43 mechanistic study indicat that au(i) complex promot the indolization step to form indole intermediate(33) that is too reactive to isolate. subsequent chiral phosphoric acid- catalyz enantioselective michael addition then generat the desir chiral product 32. in 2017, lu and co- wo

ASYMMETRIC FISCHER INDOLIZATION 3. ASYMMETRIC FISCHER INDOLIZATION since it discovery as early as 1883, fischer indolization ha been extensively utiliz for the construction of indol. 65- 67 however, catalytic enantioselective fischer indolization remain elusive for decad due to the lack of intrinsic chirality in indol and the necessity to use stoichiometric acid under harsh condition. some relat exploration of interrupt fischer rindolization to deliver chiral indolin also met with limit success. 68 achiev enantiocontrol in a review review scheme 23. desymmetrization of 1, 3- dion by catalytic enantioselective condensation with hydrazine and derivatization by fischer indolization<!-- image--> sigmatropic rearrangement process ha also remain a significant challenge in asymmetric synthesis. 69 3. 1. enantioselective aza-[3. 3]- sigmatropic rearrangement 3. 1. enantioselective aza-[3. 3]- sigmatropic rearrangement in 2011, list and co- worker report the first catalytic asymmetric fischer indolization in the form of enantioselective desymmetrization of 4- substitut cyclohexane- deriv phenylhydrazon 97(scheme 20). 70 this process us chiral phosphoric acid(CPA) as the catalyst, with the addition of cation exchange resin of CG50 to remove the ammonia side- product. us this methodology, a variety of chiral 3- substitut tetrahydrocarbazol 98 are obtain in high yield with good to excellent enantioselectivity. with comparison to the classical fischer indolization mechanism, the author propos that the initial substrate- CPA adduct 99 can be convert to both diastereomeric enamin 100 and 1000 as an ion pair with CPA, with one of them undergo a more favor irreversible aza-[3. 3]- sigmatropic rearrangement. this dynamic kinetic resolution eventually produc the final product 98 with high enantioselectivity. the ammoniumCPA salt generat in this process is regenerat by the cation exchange resin CG50. three year later, the list group report another elegant example of chiral phosphoric acid- catalyz enantioselective fischer indolization, for the synthesis of indole- fus chiral helicenc 103 from the reaction of hydrazine 101 and tricyclic ketone 102(scheme 21). 71 this represent a CONCLUSIONS AND OUTLOOK CONCLUSIONS AND OUTLOOK with the increas awareness of the importance of enantioenrich indole derivativ in pharmaceutical, catalysis, and material scienc, catalytic asymmetric construction of indol ha gain significant progress over the past few decad. by incorporat enantiocontrol in various classical indolization method, novel catalytic process have been achiev that enable the facile conversion of simple linear substrat to enantioenrich indole derivativ includ structurally novel on bear an axial or helical chirality. strategy such as indolization of 2- alkynylanilin, fischer indolization, doyle indole synthesis, and formal[3+ 2] cycloaddition have all been appli to efficient and enantioselective indole synthesis. these endeavor have also serv as an effective platform for the development<!-- image--><!-- image--> of new chiral catalyst, new cascade catalysis concept, and enantioselective synthetic method. consider the vast diversity of classical approach establish for indole synthesis, we anticipate that the subject of enantioselective indolization will witness even more excit development in the near future. ABSTRACT ABSTRACT the indole moiety, a prevalent and versatile heterocyclic scaffold, play a pivotal role in the realm of organic synthesis, underpin the structural basis of myriad natural product, pharmaceutical and advanc material. this review comprehensively survey the landscape of methodology for indole synthesis, highlight the evolution of techniqu from classical to contemporary strategy. we investigate the fischer indole synthesis, emphasiz it historical significance and mechanistic nuanc and transition to discus the reissert indole synthesis, detail it unique contribution to the synthesis of indole derivativ. furthermore, the review explor advanc methodology includ metal- catalyz reaction, c- h activation process and green synthesis approach, offer insight into their mechanism, scope and limitation. through this review, we aim to provide a holistic overview of indole synthesis, furnish researcher with a detail understand of it complex mechanism and the broad utility of the indole moiety in synthesiz biologically active compound. the synthesis method review not only underscore the chemical diversity and adaptability of indole chemistry but also highlight ongo challeng and future direction in the synthesis and transformation of derivativ of indole. this comprehensive examination serv as a valuable resource for chemist seek to harness the indole scaffold' s potential in novel synthetic application. keyword: indole moiety, organic synthesis, fischer indole synthesis, reissert indole synthesis, metal- catalyz reaction, c- h activation.
